title: Dto Change Detail
description: Client-side type for **Dto Change Detail**, kept in parity with the matching `api:dto-*` spec so remote and embedded Studio render the same JSON the API emits.
context: Client-side type for **Dto Change Detail**, kept in parity with the matching `api:dto-*` spec so remote and embedded Studio render the same JSON the API emits.

rules.requirement: client DTO matches API wire shape
rules: Field names, optional/required semantics, and nesting MUST match the paired `api:dto-*` spec. The client MUST NOT invent alternate property names.

rules.requirement: types are shared or generated from API schemas
rules: DTO types MUST be imported from a shared package or generated from the same schema source used by API presenters and OpenAPI.

rules.requirement: archived snapshot exposes archivedMeta on ChangeDetailDto
rules: When `getArchivedChange(name)` maps the archived snapshot into `ChangeDetailDto`, the result MUST set `state` to `archived` and MUST include optional `archivedMeta` with `archivedName`, `archivedAt`, and `artifactTypes` (artifact type IDs from the archive). Active changes loaded via `getChange` MUST omit `archivedMeta`.
`ChangeDetailDto` MUST include optional `invalidationPolicy` (`none` | `surgical` | `downstream` | `global`) matching the API presenter.

`ChangeHistoryEventDto` MUST include `type`, `at`, and optional `by`, and MUST allow additional properties per event type (index signature or equivalent) so `ui:change-tab-events` can list every field returned by the API presenter.

constraints: @specd/ui and @specd/client MUST NOT import @specd/core or @specd/sdk for kernel bootstrap.
HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.
